models.watchedFolders: Folders on the user's filesystem that VaultAI monitors for new files. When a new file appears, it is automatically ingested as a Document.
models.llmModels: Local LLM models available for download and use within VaultAI. Only one model can be active at a time.
models.encryptionSettings: Configuration for vault encryption — whether it is enabled, the strength of the current key, and options to change it.
models.storageInfo: Information about the vault's storage location, total size, and document count.

relationships: Each WatchedFolder produces Documents when new files are detected
Exactly one LLMModel is active at a time
EncryptionSettings apply globally to all vault content

llmModels.name: Llama 3.2 3B
llmModels.description: Fast, lightweight model ideal for quick queries and summarization. Best for everyday use on mid-range hardware.

llmModels.name: Llama 3.1 8B
llmModels.description: Balanced model with strong reasoning capabilities. Good for complex research queries and detailed explanations.

llmModels.name: Mistral 7B
llmModels.description: High-performance open model with excellent instruction following. Great for technical and code-related queries.

llmModels.name: Phi-3 Mini
llmModels.description: Microsoft's compact model with surprisingly strong performance. Ideal for low-memory devices.

llmModels.name: Gemma 2 9B
llmModels.description: Google's open model with strong multilingual support and reasoning. Best for diverse research content.

llmModels.name: Qwen 2.5 7B
llmModels.description: Alibaba's efficient model with excellent coding and analytical capabilities.
